creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
which frr version ? net/frr9 or net/frr10 

I’m not able to reproduce it on -head with net/frr10:

ifconfig epair create
ifconfig epair create
ifconfig bridge create
ifconfig epair0a up
ifconfig epair0b up
ifconfig epair1a up
ifconfig epair1b up
ifconfig bridge0 addm epair0b addm epair1b up
mkdir -p /var/run/jails/jail1
mkdir /var/run/jails/jail2
cat > /var/run/jails/jail1/frr.conf <<EOF
log file /var/run/jails/jail1/frr.log
!
ip router-id 0.0.0.1
!
interface epair0a
 ipv6 address 2001:db8::1/64
 ipv6 ospf6 area 0.0.0.0
exit
!
router ospf6
exit
!
end
EOF
cat > /var/run/jails/jail2/frr.conf <<EOF
log file /var/run/jails/jail2/frr.log
!
ip router-id 0.0.0.2
!
interface epair1a
 ipv6 address 2001:db8::2/64
 ipv6 ospf6 area 0.0.0.0
exit
!
router ospf6
exit
!
end
EOF
jail -c name=jail1 host.hostname=jail1 persist vnet vnet.interface=epair0a
jail -c name=jail2 host.hostname=jail2 persist vnet vnet.interface=epair1a
jexec jail1 service netif start
jexec jail2 service netif start
jexec jail1 sysctl net.inet6.ip6.forwarding=1
jexec jail2 sysctl net.inet6.ip6.forwarding=1
echo "service integrated-vtysh-config" > /var/run/jails/jail1/vtysh.conf
echo "service integrated-vtysh-config" > /var/run/jails/jail2/vtysh.conf
touch /var/run/jails/jail1/frr.log
touch /var/run/jails/jail2/frr.log
chown -R frr:frr /var/run/jails

jexec jail1 mgmtd -d -i /var/run/jails/jail1/mgmtd.pid --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail1/
jexec jail1 zebra -d -i /var/run/jails/jail1/zebra.pid --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail1/
jexec jail1 ospf6d -d -i /var/run/jails/jail1/ospf6d.pid --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail1/
jexec jail1 vtysh -b --config_dir /var/run/jails/jail1/ --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail1/
 
jexec jail2 mgmtd -d -i /var/run/jails/jail2/mgmtd.pid --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail2/
jexec jail2 zebra -d -i /var/run/jails/jail2/zebra.pid --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail2/
jexec jail2 ospf6d -d -i /var/run/jails/jail2/ospf6d.pid --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail2/
jexec jail2 vtysh -b --config_dir /var/run/jails/jail2/ --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail2/
 
jexec jail1 vtysh --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail1/

jexec jail2 vtysh --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail2/ 


root@bigone:~ # jexec jail2 vtysh --vty_socket /var/run/jails/jail2/

Hello, this is FRRouting (version 10.1.1).
Copyright 1996-2005 Kunihiro Ishiguro, et al.

jail2# show ipv6 ospf6 neighbor
Neighbor ID     Pri    DeadTime    State/IfState         Duration I/F[State]
0.0.0.1           1    00:00:34     Full/BDR             00:00:18 epair1a[DR]


Cleanup:
pkill ospf6d
pkill zebra
pkill mgmtd
ifconfig bridge0 destroy
ifconfig epair0a destroy
ifconfig epair1a destroy
